scenario.key_phrase: I'm just looking at options for now

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. I believe you showed interest in our JEE courses. May I know your good name?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi... uh, I'm Rahul. From Dehradun.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Nice to meet you Rahul! So you're looking at JEE preparation, that's great. Which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in 10th right now. Just... you know, exploring options.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing! Starting JEE prep after 10th is ideal. So you'll be targeting JEE Main 2027, right? That gives you good 2+ years to prepare properly.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, 2027. But I'm just looking at different options for now, nothing final.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul, it's smart to research properly! For JEE 2027, we have two excellent courses - JEE Lakshya at ₹35,999 and JEE Arjuna at ₹19,999. Both have complete syllabus coverage. What's your approximate budget range?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Umm... that sounds expensive. My parents haven't decided on budget yet. What's the difference between these two?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: No worries about budget - we offer 0% EMI! Arjuna starts at just ₹1,999/month, that's less than what families spend on daily chai! Arjuna has core content while Lakshya has additional doubt sessions and mentorship. When can you discuss with parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I need to talk to them first. Can you call back maybe next week? I'm not sure they'll agree to any course right now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! I understand parents' involvement is important. Would you like me to speak with them directly to explain the course benefits? Many parents appreciate hearing about the structured approach and results.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No no, I'll talk to them first. They don't like random calls. Maybe I'll call you back if they're interested.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Theek hai, no problem at all! Let me share my number - you can WhatsApp me anytime. Also, would you like me to send some sample lectures so you can see the teaching quality?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, you can send some samples. But I'm still just looking around at different coaching options.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll send you some Physics and Maths sample classes right after this call. Take your time to evaluate. Shall I follow up with you next Friday to see how your discussion with parents went?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Uh... maybe not next Friday. I'll call you back when I'm ready. Thanks for the information though.
